title: Temporal Cartography
intent: Mapping time as a navigable dimension, using statistical patterns and relativity to chart temporal landscapes — a system for wayfinding through cause, consequence, and cyclical recurrence.

noise_to_insight.◎: Subjective time distortion reframed as experiential cartography — personal perception becomes a valid map layer
noise_to_insight.ᘯᘰ: Chaotic temporal dynamics reframed as fractal coastline — the unmappable edge rich with detail at every zoom level
noise_to_insight.∞: Temporal loops and branches reframed as terrain features — mountains and rivers of the temporal landscape
noise_to_insight.⎯: Temporal discontinuities reframed as portals — phase transitions mark borders between temporal territories

insight: A cartography of time itself: where chaotic dynamics become fractal coastlines, subjective perception becomes a valid map layer, temporal loops become terrain features, and discontinuities become border crossings. This is navigation not through space but through consequence — charting the rivers of causality, the mountains of phase transition, and the deep ocean of statistical possibility that lies between every moment and its successor.
